## Description

Provide a summary of the documentation changes proposed by this PR. Mention if it updates guides, corrects typos, adds API specs, or expands troubleshooting documentation.

## Related Issues

Fixes # (issue number)

## Scope of Documentation

- [ ] README.md / root documentation
- [ ] Developer / API Guide
- [ ] Troubleshooting or Testing Guide
- [ ] Code comments / docstrings

## Checklist

- [ ] The style is concise and consistent with project documentation.
- [ ] Links and paths have been verified and are functional.
- [ ] Spelling, grammar, and technical terms are accurate.
- [ ] Headings and lists are properly formatted using GitHub Flavored Markdown.
